mapper.select: WITH ranked_add AS (select type_script_id, tx_hash,consumed_tx_hash,is_spent from address_24h_transaction where block_timestamp >= (SELECT MAX(block_timestamp) - 86400000 FROM address_24h_transaction)) select uh.type_script_id as typeScriptId ,uh.addressesCount,COALESCE(at.h24CkbTransactionsCount,0) as h24CkbTransactionsCount from (select type_script_id , sum(holder_count) as addressesCount from udt_holder_allocations group by type_script_id ) as uh left join ( select type_script_id,count(*) as h24CkbTransactionsCount from (select type_script_id,tx_hash from ranked_add union select type_script_id,consumed_tx_hash as tx_hash from ranked_add r2 where r2.is_spent=1 ) as ra group by type_script_id ) as at on at.type_script_id = uh.type_script_id order by ${orderByStr} ${ascOrDesc}
